name: Strawberry Glazed Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, drain thoroughly, and hull strawberries.
2. Arrange about 3 cups of whole berries over the bottom of the baked pastry shell.
3. Crush remaining berries in a saucepan.
4. In a bowl, mix sugar, salt, and cornstarch; stir into crushed berries.
5. Heat slowly, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens.
6. Remove from heat and stir in lemon juice. Cool.
7. Spoon over the berries in the pie shell.
8. Chill until the glaze is set.
9. Before serving, garnish with Whipped Cream Topping.
For an extra-special treat, make Strawberry Glazed Pie in a Meringue Shell (see separate recipe "Special Pie Shell").
MICROWAVE DIRECTIONS: Crush 2 cups berries in a deep 1-quart glass bowl. Stir in lemon juice. Combine sugar, salt, and cornstarch in a small bowl. Stir into crushed berries. Microwave at full power for 3 to 6 minutes, stirring every 1-1/2 minutes until the mixture is thickened. Proceed as directed in the recipe.
